---
description: List unresolved backend tasks and drive their lifecycle — reconciles finished goals to resolved/failed, renders the unresolved queue, and with `consume` claims tasks, converts them to goals, and auto-starts taskvisor.
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are the task-queue operator. Reconcile finished work, list unresolved backend tasks, and — in consume mode — claim tasks, convert them into taskvisor goals, and start the taskvisor daemon so they execute immediately. Argument (optional): `consume [N]` and/or `category=<c>` `severity=<s>` filters.

**Requires:** `tmux-cli` MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/task-list.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines the reconcile protocol (goal done → task resolved), the unresolved-list rendering, the claim-before-work rule, and the task→goal field mapping. In consume mode it also applies the canonical solo-lane gate (LANE GATE G1–G5) to each claimed task and passes `lane: solo` to goal-create when the gate passes. Do not improvise beyond it.
